title: Blunders
content:
There was a young man from the city,
     Who met what he thought was a kitty;
        He gave it a pat,
        And said, "Nice little cat!"
     And they buried his clothes out of pity.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Blunders"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
